name: Alpha Environmental Services Inc
description: Provides certified mold inspections, testing, removal, and water damage restoration for residential and commercial properties in Portland with over 20 years experience.

name: Mold Inspection & Testing Portland Oregon
description: Certified mold inspector providing unbiased mold testing services for homes and businesses in Portland and surrounding areas since 2016. Test-only company focused on indoor air quality.

name: Mold Inspection Sciences
description: Provides mold inspection, testing, detection, CIRS protocol, post-remediation clearance testing, and environmental risk assessments in Portland, Vancouver, and surrounding areas. Over 20 years experience, test-only with no remediation conflict of interest.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: Craig is extremely knowledgeable with a strong environmental science background, very thorough, and detail-oriented.
He made a stressful situation way less stressful. You have a fantastic employee in him.
He caught issues we did not see, nor did other professionals.
Craig is kind, helpful, honest, enjoyable, explains everything well and puts us at ease.

sentiment.summary: Mold Inspection Sciences, particularly inspector Craig, receives overwhelmingly positive reviews praising his expertise, professionalism, thoroughness, and exceptional ability to communicate complex information clearly during stressful situations.

name: Mold Testing Services of Oregon
description: Specializes in objective mold inspections and testing for residential and light commercial properties in Portland area. Tailored services without remediation to ensure transparency.
